name: pinchtab_hand
description: part of pinchtab skills:this part let you use the web page and Interact with elements

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: 'nav' to another url;'click' the element you found;'type' some words to the element you found

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: URL address for 'nav' or html element ID for 'type'/'click'

parameters.name: input_value
parameters.description: only used for 'type',the words you want to type
